title: Uvena System Constabulary
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Uvena System Constabulary''' was a government corps on [[Uvena Prime/Legends|Uvena Prime]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

Sometime before [[11 BBY/Legends|11 BBY]], the [[Alpha Premier]] [[Korta Sarc]] suddenly disappeared. The Uvena System Constabulary assigned two [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] scouts, [[Lak Sivrak/Legends|Lak Sivrak]] and [[Yurdak Fav]], to find Sac. They eventually discovered his murdered body inside the [[Jenet/Legends|Jenet]] embassy.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
